# FlowForge Sprint Launch Update

Update code: FF-Sprint-Launch-v4.2  
Issued: 2026-06-18  
Priority: latest_update.md > platform_specs.txt > visual_rules.json > asset_manifest.json > deprecated_assets.json > brand_brief.md.

Active placement: LinkedIn sponsored feed image. Ignore the older Instagram square draft in the PDF.

Current copy fragments:

- Product name: FlowForge Sprint
- Primary headline: Plan the week in one calm board.
- Supporting line: A focused planning space for small product teams.
- CTA: Start a sprint preview
- Optional proof chip: Built for Monday planning.

Do not use the old slogan `Automate Everything`, enterprise claims, or AI replacement claims. The hero must read as a planning-board UI, not an analytics dashboard. If the copy area crosses a bright UI panel, add a deep green overlay behind the text.
